## What does this change?

A short description of the change and the motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (agent now picks the right command/behavior)
- [ ] New capability (covers an additional `todo.sh` feature)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Commands/flags verified against the official todo.txt CLI (`todo.sh help`)
- [ ] Tested against a real (or throwaway) `todo.txt` in a Claude session
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased"
- [ ] Examples follow the existing style in `SKILL.md`
